name: Passover Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. Grease a muffin tin.
3. In a saucepan, combine the margarine and salt with 1 cup of water. Heat until boiling.
4. Gradually add in the cake meal, stirring constantly, then remove from heat.
5. Mix in the matzo meal and let cool for about 5 minutes.
6. Beat the eggs one at a time into the batter.
7. Fill each muffin cup about 3/4 full with batter.
8. Bake for 20 minutes at 450°F (230°C).
9. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
